ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER HUBER, ARLENE RUGGIERI
LAW AND MOTION 302, HRG ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM NOV-18-2014 TO JAN-14-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, AT THE PETITIONER'S REQUEST. (D302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, HRG ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM JAN-14-2015 TO FEB-18-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE MS. COBLE AN OPPORTUNITY TO HIRE COUNSEL. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED 5 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. REPLY MAY BE FILED BY MR. BROWN. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR # 7489; DEPT. 302. =302/AJR

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees Awardable As An Item Of Costs Of Petitioner Arlene Ruggieri Huber
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER ARLENE HUBER'S Motion To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees Awardable As An Item Of Costs Of Petitioner Arlene Ruggieri Huber is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963 =302/eg

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ARLENE HUBER'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AFTER HEARING SIGNED. PETITIONER MAY SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. BROWN OF THE BROWN & SULLIVAN LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 521-1211 EXT. 203 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
JOYCE COBLE, TEL. NO. 336-5891, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - LATE NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE ON THE RECORD FOR MR. BROWN TO APPEAR THROUGH COURT CALL. PETITIONER ARLENE HUBER'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to February 18, 2015 to give Ms. Coble an opportunity to hire counsel. Opposition to be filed 5 days before the hearing. Reply may be filed by Mr. Brown. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/AJR.

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Continued To Jan-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
